merge.name: Mesclar PDF
merge.description: Combine vários arquivos PDF em um único documento.
merge.metaTitle: Mesclar PDF - Combinador de PDF gratuito online
merge.metaDescription: Mescle vários arquivos PDF em um único documento. Ferramenta online gratuita, sem upload necessário. Seus arquivos ficam no navegador.
merge.keywords: mesclar pdf, combinar pdf, juntar pdf, mesclador de pdf online

faq.q1: Como funciona a mesclagem de PDF?
faq.a1: Envie vários arquivos PDF, reordene conforme necessário e clique em mesclar. Todo o processamento acontece no seu navegador — os arquivos nunca são enviados.
faq.q2: Existe um limite de tamanho de arquivo?
faq.a2: Não há limite fixo, mas arquivos muito grandes podem ficar lentos já que o processamento acontece no seu navegador.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: What is Merge PDF?
intro.content:
Merge PDF combines multiple PDF files into a single document. Upload PDFs, rearrange their order by dragging, and merge them into one seamless file — all processed locally in your browser using pdf-lib.

No page limits, no file size limits, no watermarks. Just fast, reliable PDF merging.

howToUse.title: How to Use Merge PDF
howToUse.content:
1. Upload two or more PDF files by clicking the dropzone or dragging them onto the page
  2. Drag and drop to rearrange the file order
  3. Click Merge to combine all PDFs into one
  4. Download the merged PDF file

The merged PDF preserves all pages, bookmarks, and formatting from the original files.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Unlimited Files: Merge any number of PDFs at once
  • Drag to Reorder: Arrange PDF order by dragging before merging
  • Page Preview: See thumbnail previews of each PDF's pages
  • Preserves Quality: No re-encoding — original PDF quality maintained
  • Powered by pdf-lib: Reliable PDF manipulation using the pdf-lib library
  • No File Size Limits: Limited only by your device's memory

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Report Assembly: Combine individual report sections into one document
  • Document Bundles: Merge related documents for submission (applications, contracts)
  • Invoices: Combine monthly invoices into a single file for records
  • Presentations: Merge individual slide decks into one PDF
  • Archive: Consolidate multiple documents into a single archive file

privacy.title: Privacy-First PDF Merging
privacy.content:
PDFs are merged entirely in your browser using the pdf-lib library.

  • Your documents never leave your device — critical for confidential contracts, financial records, and legal documents
  • No server uploads, no cloud processing
  • Works offline after the page loads

intro.title: What is Split PDF?
intro.content: Split PDF divides a PDF into separate files — extract individual pages, page ranges, or split into single-page files. Perfect for extracting specific sections from large documents.

howToUse.title: How to Use Split PDF
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a PDF file
  2. Select pages to extract: individual pages, ranges (e.g., 1-5), or split all pages
  3. Click Split to extract the selected pages
  4. Download split PDFs individually or as a ZIP file

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Page Selection: Choose individual pages or ranges to extract
  • Split All: Split every page into separate PDF files
  • Page Preview: Visual thumbnails of each page for easy selection
  • ZIP Download: Download all split files as a single ZIP
  • Preserves Quality: Original PDF quality maintained in split files
  • Powered by pdf-lib: Reliable PDF manipulation

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:

  • Chapter Separation: Split a book or manual into individual chapters
  • Form Extraction: Extract specific forms from a multi-page PDF
  • Sharing: Extract and share only relevant pages from a document
  • Filing: Separate combined scans into individual documents

intro.title: What is PDF to Image?
intro.content:
PDF to Image converts PDF pages into high-quality JPG or PNG images. Set the DPI/quality level for your needs — from web-optimized thumbnails to high-resolution print images.

Convert all pages or select specific ones, powered by pdfjs-dist for accurate rendering.

howToUse.title: How to Use PDF to Image
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a PDF file
  2. Select output format: JPG or PNG
  3. Adjust the DPI/quality setting (higher = larger, sharper images)
  4. Click Convert and download images individually or as a ZIP

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• JPG & PNG Output: Choose the format that fits your needs
  • Adjustable DPI: Control resolution from web-quality to print-quality
  • All Pages: Convert all pages or select specific ones
  • Powered by pdfjs-dist: Mozilla's PDF rendering engine for accurate conversion
  • ZIP Download: Download all images in a single ZIP file
  • High Fidelity: Accurate rendering of text, images, and vector graphics

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Presentations: Convert PDF slides to images for PowerPoint or Google Slides

faq.q1: Como funciona a compressão de PDF?
faq.a1: As páginas são re-renderizadas como imagens JPEG no nível de qualidade escolhido e re-incorporadas. Menor qualidade significa arquivos menores, mas com menor fidelidade visual.
faq.a2: Não, como as páginas são convertidas em imagens durante a compressão, o texto não é mais selecionável no PDF comprimido.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: What is Compress PDF?
intro.content:
Compress PDF reduces PDF file size by re-rendering pages at optimized quality levels. Choose from High, Medium, or Low compression to balance file size against visual quality.

Ideal for reducing large PDFs for email attachments or web uploads.

howToUse.title: How to Use Compress PDF
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a PDF file
  2. Select the compression level: High Quality (larger file), Medium, or Low Quality (smallest file)
  3. Click Compress to process
  4. See the file size reduction and download the compressed PDF

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Three Quality Levels: High, Medium, and Low compression presets
  • Size Comparison: See original vs. compressed file sizes
  • Page Re-rendering: Pages are re-rendered at the selected quality
  • Powered by pdfjs-dist + pdf-lib: Render with pdfjs, rebuild with pdf-lib
  • All Page Types: Works with text, images, and mixed-content PDFs
  • Preview: Check quality before downloading

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Email: Reduce PDF size to fit within email attachment limits
  • Web Upload: Compress for faster uploads to web forms and portals
  • Storage: Reduce archive sizes for document storage
  • Sharing: Create smaller files for messaging apps and file sharing
  • Submission: Meet file size requirements for online submissions

privacy.title: Privacy-First PDF Compression
privacy.content:
PDF compression runs entirely in your browser using pdfjs-dist and pdf-lib.

  • Your documents never leave your device
  • No server uploads or cloud processing
  • Works offline after the page loads

faq.q1: Posso personalizar a aparência da marca d'água?
faq.a1: Sim, você pode ajustar o texto, opacidade (transparência) e tamanho da fonte. A marca d'água é posicionada diagonalmente em cada página.
faq.q2: A marca d'água é aplicada em todas as páginas?
faq.a2: Sim, a mesma marca d'água é aplicada em todas as páginas do PDF.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.

faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: What is PDF Watermark?
intro.content: PDF Watermark adds diagonal text watermarks to every page of a PDF document. Mark documents as DRAFT, CONFIDENTIAL, SAMPLE, or any custom text with adjustable opacity and color.

howToUse.title: How to Use PDF Watermark
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a PDF file
  2. Enter your watermark text
  3. Customize color and opacity
  4. Click Add Watermark to apply
  5. Download the watermarked PDF

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Custom Text: Any text as a watermark (DRAFT, CONFIDENTIAL, etc.)
  • Diagonal Layout: Classic diagonal watermark placement
  • Adjustable Opacity: Control watermark visibility
  • Color Options: Choose watermark color
  • All Pages: Watermark applied to every page
  • Powered by pdf-lib: Reliable PDF text overlay

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Draft Documents: Mark preliminary versions as DRAFT
  • Confidentiality: Label sensitive documents as CONFIDENTIAL
  • Sample Copies: Mark preview copies as SAMPLE
  • Legal: Add COPY or ORIGINAL watermarks to legal documents
  • Proofing: Mark proof copies to prevent use as finals

privacy.title: Privacy-First PDF Processing
privacy.content:
Watermarks are applied entirely in your browser using pdf-lib.

  • Your documents never leave your device
  • No server processing
  • Works offline after the page loads

crop.name: Recortar PDF
crop.description: Recorte páginas de PDF definindo margens para remover de cada lado.
crop.metaTitle: Recortar PDF - Ferramenta de recorte de PDF gratuita online
crop.metaDescription: Recorte páginas de PDF removendo margens de cada lado. Ferramenta online gratuita, funciona no seu navegador.
crop.keywords: recortar pdf, cortar pdf, margens pdf, ferramenta de recorte pdf
crop.marginsHint: Digite a quantidade a recortar de cada lado (1 ponto ≈ 0,35mm)

faq.a1: PDF usa pontos como unidade de medida. 1 ponto = 1/72 polegada ≈ 0,35mm. Uma página carta padrão US tem 612 × 792 pontos.
faq.q2: O recorte reduz o tamanho do arquivo?
faq.a2: O recorte altera a área visível, mas não remove o conteúdo oculto, portanto o tamanho do arquivo pode não diminuir significativamente.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: What is Crop PDF?
intro.content: Crop PDF trims margins from PDF pages by adjusting the crop box. Remove unwanted whitespace or borders from all pages at once by specifying crop margins in points.

howToUse.title: How to Use Crop PDF
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a PDF file
  2. Set crop margins for each side: top, bottom, left, right (in points)
  3. Preview the cropped result
  4. Click Crop and download the trimmed PDF

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Four-Side Control: Set margins for top, bottom, left, and right independently
  • Points Unit: Precise control in PDF points (1 point = 1/72 inch)
  • All Pages: Crop applied uniformly to every page
  • Preview: See the crop area before applying
  • Powered by pdf-lib: Reliable PDF crop box manipulation
  • Non-Destructive: Adjusts crop box without modifying page content

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Margin Removal: Trim excessive whitespace from document margins
  • Print Optimization: Remove print margins for edge-to-edge printing
  • Slide Cleanup: Crop borders from converted presentation slides
  • Scan Cleanup: Remove scanner borders from scanned documents
  • Display Optimization: Reduce margins for better on-screen reading

privacy.title: Privacy-First PDF Cropping
privacy.content:
PDF cropping happens entirely in your browser using pdf-lib.

  • Your documents never leave your device
  • No server processing
  • Works offline after the page loads

faq.a1: Não, tudo acontece no seu navegador. Sua assinatura e PDF nunca são enviados para nenhum servidor.
faq.q2: Posso colocar a assinatura em uma página específica?
faq.a2: Sim, você pode escolher qual página assinar e definir a posição exata (coordenadas X, Y) e o tamanho da assinatura.

intro.title: What is E-Sign PDF?
intro.content:
E-Sign PDF lets you draw your signature and place it on any page of a PDF document. Create a digital signature using your mouse or touchscreen, then position and resize it on the document.

Simple electronic signing without any account or subscription required.

howToUse.title: How to Use E-Sign PDF
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a PDF file
  2. Draw your signature on the signature pad
  3. Click on the page where you want to place the signature
  4. Resize and position the signature as needed
  5. Click Save and download the signed PDF

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Draw Signature: Create your signature using mouse or touchscreen
  • Any Page: Place signature on any page of the document
  • Resize & Position: Adjust signature size and placement
  • Re-draw: Clear and redraw your signature as needed
  • Powered by pdf-lib: Signature embedded directly in the PDF
  • No Account Required: No signup, login, or subscription needed

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Contracts: Sign agreements and contracts electronically
  • Forms: Add signatures to application or consent forms
  • Approvals: Sign off on documents and proposals
  • Letters: Add a personal signature to formal letters
  • Receipts: Sign delivery or receipt confirmations

privacy.title: Privacy-First Document Signing
privacy.content:
Signatures are drawn and embedded entirely in your browser using Canvas API and pdf-lib.

  • Your documents and signature never leave your device — critical for legal documents
  • No server processing, no third-party signature services
  • Works offline after the page loads

extract-images.name: Extrair imagens do PDF
extract-images.description: Extraia todas as imagens incorporadas de um arquivo PDF e baixe-as.
extract-images.metaTitle: Extrair imagens do PDF - Extrator de imagens PDF gratuito online
extract-images.metaDescription: Extraia todas as imagens de documentos PDF. Baixe individualmente ou como arquivo ZIP. Ferramenta online gratuita.
extract-images.keywords: extrair imagens pdf, extrator de imagens pdf, obter imagens de pdf, pdf para imagens

faq.q1: Quais formatos de imagem são extraídos?
faq.a1: As imagens são extraídas no formato original quando possível (JPEG). Outras imagens são convertidas para formato PNG.
faq.q2: Esta ferramenta extrai todas as imagens?
faq.a2: Ela extrai imagens raster incorporadas do PDF. Gráficos vetoriais e texto renderizado como caminhos não são extraídos como imagens separadas.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: No. All processing happens entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device. You can verify this by opening DevTools (F12) and checking the Network tab — zero upload requests.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: What is Extract Images from PDF?
intro.content: Extract Images from PDF finds and extracts all embedded images from a PDF document. Download individual images or all images as a ZIP file — useful for recovering graphics from PDF reports, brochures, or presentations.

howToUse.title: How to Use Extract Images from PDF
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a PDF file
  2. Click Extract Images to scan and find all embedded images
  3. Preview the extracted images
  4. Download individual images or all as a ZIP file

Extracted images are saved in their original format (JPEG or PNG) when possible.

features.title: Key Features
features.content:
• Auto-Detection: Finds all embedded images in the PDF automatically
  • Image Preview: See all extracted images before downloading
  • Individual Download: Download specific images you need
  • ZIP Download: Download all images in a single ZIP file
  • Format Preservation: Extracts images in JPEG or PNG format
  • Powered by pdfjs-dist: Accurate image extraction using Mozilla's engine

useCases.title: Common Use Cases
useCases.content:
• Asset Recovery: Extract logos, photos, or graphics from PDF documents
  • Content Reuse: Pull images from presentations or brochures for reuse
  • Research: Extract charts, diagrams, or figures from academic papers
  • Archiving: Save individual images from PDF photo albums
  • Design: Recover design assets from PDF proofs or mockups

privacy.title: Privacy-First Image Extraction
privacy.content:
Image extraction runs entirely in your browser using pdfjs-dist.

  • Your PDFs never leave your device
  • No server processing or uploads
  • Works offline after the page loads
